visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in front of a large red and white MUJI sign, holding a brown shopping bag and smiling broadly. She is wearing a striped black and white polo shirt and loose beige pants. (2) The scene shifts to the interior of a MUJI retail store. The woman walks through aisles filled with skincare products and household items, holding a grey shopping basket. The lighting is bright and even. (3) A close-up shows a blue insulated bottle. The woman pours a dark carbonated beverage from a plastic bottle into it. She then drinks from the blue bottle in a brightly lit kitchen setting. (4) In a close-up, a white foam cleaner is applied to a dirty white clog shoe. A pink cloth is used to wipe away the grime. A split-screen comparison shows the 'Before' and 'After' states of the shoe. (5) The woman holds a roll of grey cleaning wipes in the store. The scene cuts to a bathroom where she wipes a chrome faucet and a glass shower door. A split-screen shows the removal of water spots. (6) A light blue spray bottle is shown on a store shelf. The woman sprays the mist onto a young boy's white t-shirt. They are in a dimly lit indoor space that looks like a bedroom. (7) A tube of body scrub is shown. The woman applies a white cream to her hand and rubs it in near a bathroom sink. A hand-on-hand comparison follows. (8) Two brown pump bottles are held up in the store. The woman then pumps lotion onto her arm and rubs it in while sitting on a bed. (9) A clear booster serum bottle is shown. The woman pumps the liquid into her palms and applies it to her face in a bedroom setting. (10) The final shot is a top-down view of a grey MUJI shopping basket filled with all the previously shown products.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 2025 MUJI 必買好物. [Logo]: MUJI 無印良品. (2) [Variety]: NO.1 碳酸飲料專用保冷瓶. [Slogan]: 日幣 2990円. (3) [Subtitle]: 長效保冷6小時. (4) [Variety]: NO.2 鞋用泡沫清潔劑. [Slogan]: 日幣 790円. [Subtitle]: 使用前 使用後. (5) [Variety]: NO.3 水垢水漬清潔布. [Slogan]: 日幣 299円. [Subtitle]: 使用前 使用後. (6) [Variety]: NO.4 涼感噴霧 (服飾款). [Slogan]: 日幣 990円. (7) [Variety]: NO.5 涼感身體磨砂膏. [Slogan]: 日幣 1290円. (8) [Variety]: NO.6 精油香氛 沐浴乳、身體乳. [Slogan]: 日幣 1490円. [Subtitle]: 兩種香氣. (9) [Variety]: NO.7 米糠發酵導入美容液. [Slogan]: 日幣 1990円. [Subtitle]: 保養第一步. (10) [Slogan]: 無印良品 好物推薦. [Variety]: 趕快筆記起來.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 young boy (child), and at least 2 background shoppers in the store scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a black and white horizontally striped polo shirt and oversized beige cargo pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video alternates between a well-lit MUJI retail store with organized wooden shelves and various home interiors including a modern kitchen with white cabinets, a clean bathroom with chrome fixtures, and a cozy bedroom.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic BGM featuring a steady synth bass and bright percussion. A female narrator speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. (2) A clear liquid pouring sound and a fizzing carbonation SFX are heard as the narrator introduces the first product. (3) A sharp 'spritz' SFX and a 'whoosh' transition sound occur as the focus moves to cleaning products. (4) A wet wiping or squeaking sound effect is layered over the music during the faucet cleaning demonstration. (5) A bubbly 'pop' SFX accompanies the appearance of variety text on screen. (6) A child's voice is heard briefly, speaking in a soft, high-pitched tone, confirming the cooling sensation of the spray. (7) The narrator's speech rate remains fast and consistent throughout, concluding with a celebratory rising intonation as she summarizes the shopping haul.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping guide and product recommendation list for MUJI items in 2025. It leverages the creator's energetic personality and practical demonstrations to highlight the unique features of specific lifestyle, cleaning, and beauty products, encouraging viewers to purchase them.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly lists MUJI product names, prices in Yen, and demonstrates their effectiveness in a positive light, structured as a 'must-buy' list.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video features very high information density with frequent text overlays and rapid cuts synchronized to the upbeat BGM. The use of split-screen 'Before/After' demonstrations effectively validates the product claims.
